name: Paellaquinoa
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked chicken, cut into 1"-2" pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté onion and garlic in half the olive oil until fragrant.
2. Add quinoa and saffron; stir to coat evenly.
3. In a separate pan, cook chicken and sausage in remaining olive oil over medium heat until browned.
4. Stir together cooked chicken, sausage, black olives, peas, and chicken stock with quinoa mixture.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Transfer the mixture to a large covered casserole dish and bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until quinoa has absorbed all liquid.
7. Add shrimp and clams; cover and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
